title: Voice Profile
description: The primary output artifact of the voice elicitation engine. A comprehensive, quantified representation of a writer's voice across gold-standard dimensions, gap dimensions, semantic differentials, calibration data, and distinctive features.

gold_standard_dimension.description: A gold-standard voice dimension with composite score derived from self-report and observed measurement.

score.description: Composite score blending self-report and observed values, weighted by confidence.

self_report.description: Score derived from the participant's self-reported responses.

observed.description: Score derived from behavioral observation and writing sample analysis.

confidence.description: Confidence level in the composite score (0 = no confidence, 1 = full confidence). Influenced by self-reportability tier, response quality, and measurement agreement.

gap_dimension.description: A secondary voice dimension measured through self-report, observation, or both.

$schema.description: Schema version identifier for this voice profile format.

profile_id.description: Unique identifier for this voice profile.

created_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when this profile was generated.

version.description: Semantic version of this voice profile (e.g., '1.0.0').

session_id.description: Identifier of the interview session that produced this profile.

identity_summary.description: A natural-language summary of the writer's voice identity, suitable for display or use as a system prompt preamble.

writer_type.description: The participant's determined writer type that guided interview branching.

gold_standard_dimensions.description: The 8 core voice dimensions measured with high rigor through triangulated self-report and behavioral observation.

formality.description: Degree of formal vs. informal register in writing.

emotional_tone.description: Emotional valence and intensity in writing, from reserved to expressive.

personality.description: Degree to which the writer's personality emerges through their prose.

complexity.description: Syntactic and conceptual complexity of the writing.

audience_awareness.description: Degree to which the writer adapts to and addresses their audience.

authority.description: Level of authoritative, expert, or confident voice.

narrativity.description: Tendency toward narrative and storytelling in writing.

humor.description: Use of humor, wit, irony, and playfulness in writing.

gap_dimensions.description: Secondary voice dimensions that extend the profile beyond the 8 gold-standard measures. Keyed by dimension name.

semantic_differential.description: 20 bipolar adjective pair ratings capturing nuanced stylistic preferences. Keys are hyphenated pair identifiers (e.g., 'formal-casual').

additionalProperties.description: Position on the bipolar scale from 1.0 (first pole) to 7.0 (second pole).

calibration.description: Self-awareness calibration data comparing self-report to observed scores, identifying blind spots and aspirational gaps.

overall_self_awareness.description: Aggregate self-awareness score (0 = no correlation between self-report and observed, 1 = perfect alignment).

high_awareness_dimensions.description: Dimensions where self-report closely matches observed scores.

blind_spots.description: Dimensions where self-report diverges significantly from observed scores, indicating limited self-awareness.

aspirational_gaps.description: Dimensions where the participant aspires to a different level than their current observed score.

dimension.description: Name of the dimension with an aspirational gap.

current.description: Current observed score for this dimension.

desired.description: Desired/aspirational score the participant would like to achieve.

delta.description: Difference between desired and current (positive = aspires higher, negative = aspires lower).

distinctive_features.description: Salient, unusual, or particularly noteworthy aspects of the writer's voice that distinguish them.

voice_stability_map.description: Characterizes which voice attributes remain stable and which adapt across different writing contexts.

stable_across_contexts.description: Voice attributes that remain consistent regardless of audience or genre.

adapts_by_context.description: Voice attributes that the writer consciously or unconsciously adjusts by context.

writing_sample_analysis.description: Aggregate statistics from NLP analysis of writing samples collected during the session.

total_words.description: Total word count across all writing samples.

additionalProperties.description: Computed aggregate metrics from writing sample analysis.

metadata.description: Session and quality metadata summarizing how the profile was derived.

questions_answered.description: Total number of questions answered in the session.

branch_path.description: The branching path taken through the adaptive interview.

attention_check_pass.description: Whether the participant passed the minimum threshold for attention checks.

satisficing_flags.description: Total number of satisficing indicators (too-fast responses, straightlining) detected.
